ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Lode FR #198 Xiaohongshu real read-only capability packages.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only research/source locators outside Lode.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode Xiaohongshu package assets, registry files, contract docs, and LODE-205 Loom carriers only.
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #198 #205 #206 #207 #208 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Lode package assets, registry fixtures, contract docs, and LODE-205 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Harbor, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live Xiaohongshu login automation, write or engagement actions, batch crawling, CAPTCHA/safety bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions in the execution subagent.

ownership_constraints_detail.external_action_boundary: No live Xiaohongshu login automation, write or engagement actions, batch crawling, CAPTCHA/safety bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions in the execution subagent.

integration_evidence: Added Xiaohongshu search-notes and read-note-detail package assets using existing validator-supported package roles.
Added resource requirements, login/page readiness, signed-ref handoff, post-check, failure mapping, redacted fixtures, registry entries, query fixture, and package contract documentation.

Validation passed: package validators, full registry validation, Python compile, git diff --check, Loom verify, Loom fact-chain, Loom suite validate, Loom suite evidence validate, and Loom suite carrier validate.

assets: sites/xiaohongshu/search-notes validates as a read package.
sites/xiaohongshu/read-note-detail validates as a read package.
registry/local-packages.json and registry/local-query.fixture.json expose both package refs for Core/App discovery.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This PR adds repo-local Lode package assets, registry fixtures, and docs only; it does not add runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, or executable browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Validator, registry, Core/App package discovery, resource requirement declaration, fixture shape, post-check fixture output, and failure vocabulary.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR adds live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, write/precheck behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership changes.
